technique_summary: Exceptional performance with rapid, precise execution of all task requirements. All knot throwing techniques were correct with proper hand switching between throws.
improvement_suggestions: Consider this performance as a benchmark for consistency
strengths: Extremely fast completion time of 22 seconds
